modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to launch LockDown Browser on Mac due to application conflict.

full_description_text: The user was trying to take an online quiz using the LockDown Browser. They said that when they tried to open it, a white screen appeared. There was a message that said something about bad launch data. The user mentioned that another application was open, which might be causing the problem.
short_description: Unable to launch LockDown Browser on Mac due to application conflict.
description: The user was trying to take an online quiz using the LockDown Browser. They said that when they tried to open it, a white screen appeared. There was a message that said something about bad launch data. The user mentioned that another application was open, which might be causing the problem.
